name: Mastercard Inc
summary: Mastercard Incorporated is a global payments technology company operating under the Mastercard brand through its subsidiaries, including Mastercard International Incorporated. The company provides payment processing, transaction network services, and related technology solutions. Its business involves facilitating electronic payments across a global network, serving customers including financial institutions, merchants, governments, and consumers.
